description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-action-bar. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core, verify ARIA roles, keyboard nav, screen reader behavior. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update doc page using standard template. All 12 sections filled.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify isolated import and standalone HTML rendering.
4. **Existing tests pass** — `npm run verify` clean.

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never `= null` on `@query` fields
- C-PATTERN-02: No `setAttribute()` in constructor
- C-PATTERN-06: Event listeners before `await`

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/`
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-action-bar.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations, doc page complete, individual import works, verify passes
title: LAUNCH READY: hx-action-bar
